titleStmt.title: SII 24.213: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 213. (A.R. No. 42 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records the ratification of the order of the deity (in the previous record) by the temple authorities assigning the house-sites (vide No. 212), pathways, etc., out of the lands carved out of Vikramachōḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam for the formation of Kaliyugarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Kāliṅgarāyar alias Periyaperumāḷ, stipulating that should an occasion arise for the donees to sell the lands so assigned to them they should confine such transaction among themselves or the Bhāgavatas and persons of the same tenets as themselves. The bhaṭṭas were required to measure out ghee for a lamp as tax on their housesites.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Etat sarvāmarādhiśa maulimālā vibhūṣaṇam śri mat śri raṅganāthasya bhṛūtya varggasya śāsanam . tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam vikramacoḻaccaturvedi maṅkalattu sabhai yār pakkalile Uṭaiyār periyaperumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyar koṇṭuvaitta kali yukarāma ccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukkut tirukkārttikait tirunāḷaikku Eḻuṉ taruḷi puṟappaṭṭu Abhiṣekap periya tirumaṇṭapattu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ tirumuttiṉ pantalkkiḻ cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ tiruppaḷḷikkaṭṭilil
nācciyāroṭum kūṭa Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruvāymoḻi keṭṭaruḷāṉikka Inta vikrama coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār pakkalile Inta kāliṅkarāyar tamakku naṉṟāka Akaram vaikka muppattiraṇṭu maṉaikkum Inta vāstuvukku Uḷppaṭṭa nāṭṭupperu vaḻikku parivattaṉaiyāka viṭaveṇṭum nilamum Inta Akarattiniṉṟum kāveri Āṟṟukkup pokap peruvaḻikku veṇṭum nilamum vilaiyāka koṇṭu perumāḷ tiruṉāmattāl muppattiraṇṭu
paṭṭakaḷai Akaram vai(y)ttār Eṉṟum Inta paṭṭakaḷ Inta maṉaikaḷ kāṇiyākappeṟa veṇumeṉṟum jiyarum nāṅkaḷum maṟṟum Aṉaittuk kottil Uḷḷārum viṇṇap pañ ceyya Ippaṭi ceyvateṉṟu prasādam ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiye Inta vikramacoḻa ccaturvedi maṅkalattu sabhaiyār pakkalile vilaikoṇṭa puṉcey kuḻi toḷāyirattu Aṉpatum naṉcey kuḻi nūṟṟāṟekālukkum Itukkuḷppaṭṭa teṅku mā
pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷukku Uḷppaṭṭa Itukku varum kaṭamai kaḻittu perumāḷ Eḻutina tirumukappaṭiye kaḻittu Intamaṉai muppattiraṇṭum Itil puḻakkaṭai vā niḷamu Inta Akarattiniṉṟu kāveri Āṟṟukkup pokiṟa peruvaḻi Uḷppaṭa tāṅkaḷ kāṇiyāka Aṉupavittu Inta maṉai Iṟaikku Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāle nāṉāḻi tiruviḷakkukku ṉey Āṇṭutoṟum paṇṭārattile Aḷakkavum
Inta Akarattu maṉaikaḷ viṟṟu vilaicceyyumiṭattu tanṉil tāṉ Oḻiya veṟu cilarkku viṟkkumpotu bhāgavatarumāy nam darśanattil Uḷḷārkku viṟkkavum Inta maṉaikaḷ taṅkaḷukku candrādityavarai kāṇiyāka Aṉupavippārkaḷākavum conṉom § śrīraṅkanārāyaṇa dāssya śrīrāmanampi Eḻuttu śrīvaikuntadāsan Eḻuttu tiruc colaippiccan Eḻuttu tirunaṟayūrdāsan Eḻuttu Amutapperumāḷ Eḻuttu §
maruṅkūr tiruvillipputtūr ṉampi Eḻuttu nalantikaḷ nārāyaṇanampi Eḻuttu karuṇā karadāsar Eḻuttu § vaṇṭuv(ā)rāpatinampi Eḻuttu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ Eḻuttu § paṇiyālk koyilk kaṇakku ciraṅkanārāyaṇappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 24.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
